# Security Policy

To report a security issue, please use [https://g.co/vulnz](https://g.co/vulnz).

We use `g.co/vulnz` for our intake, and do coordinated vulnerability disclosure through the
[Google Bug Hunters](https://bughunters.google.com/) program. We will respond within 3 working
days of your report on `g.co/vulnz`.

Please do **not** report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.
